history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is safe, and the goal O is visible ahead and slightly to the right. Moving forward brings me closer to the open path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell in front of me is blocked by a wall, so I cannot go forward. The open cell to my right is safe, and turning clockwise will orient me toward that path around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible up and to the left, but there is lava directly in front of me. The safest immediate move is to rotate counter-clockwise so I can look for a safe route around the lava and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up again. The cell in front is a safe floor tile, so moving forward is the best way to advance toward the goal, which is visible ahead and to the right.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly ahead and one step to the right from here, but my immediate forward cell is safe floor. Moving forward keeps me on the path toward the goal without touching lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal is still visible one cell ahead and to the right. Since the cell directly in front of me is safe, I will move forward to continue approaching it.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>
The goal is still directly ahead after one safe step. I should continue moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

</thought>
<action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>

<thought>
The goal is still visible directly ahead on a safe floor tile, so the best action remains moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE

<thought>

</thought>
